summary: Presentation-readiness sprint verified end-to-end. ALL 4 role landings and per-role sidebars distinct and correct. RBAC negatives enforced. Cabinet decisions-before-KPIs, French money format (X XXX,Y milliards FCFA), PDF export, Direction portfolio (DAF=5 rows) with vue=delayed banner and edit-save flow, M&E validation workspace + audit log, Admin user-management land all working. Header has no global search and no notifications. Regression: /accueil, /pnd-402, /politique-eftp, /strategie-digitale, /alignement, /legacy-pnd, /budget-consolide all render.

cabinet_reader.sidebar_nav_cabinet_reader: present, groups Pilotage + Progression stratégique + Référentiels rendered
cabinet_reader.cabinet_budget_format: 'milliards FCFA' present, no ' Bn' in cabinet-budget block

direction_editor.edit_save_flow: edit-activity-* opens edit-dialog, save-activity closes dialog (toast confirmed indirectly via dialog dismissal)

me_validator.vw_lists_present: vw-list-missing, vw-list-pending, vw-list-nosource, vw-list-incomplete all rendered FIRST before full KPI table
me_validator.sidebar_groups: Suivi & Validation + Référentiels; nav-validation, nav-plan-action, nav-imports, nav-audit visible

admin.sidebar_nav_admin: present with nav-admin-users + nav-audit + nav-imports + Application group (nav-cabinet, nav-plan-action, nav-kpi)

issues: All large totals correctly rendered in 'X XXX,Y milliards FCFA' (e.g. '1 202,1 milliards FCFA', '293,8 milliards FCFA') — no remaining 'Bn'/'Md' ambiguous abbreviations spotted.

critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.roleHome correctly maps the 4 roles to operational landing URLs; HomeRedirect in App.js consumes it on '/'.
RoleRoute in App.js gates /admin-users to admin only and /audit-log + /imports to me_validator/admin — confirmed via UI access-denied for the other roles.
Sidebar.jsx exposes 4 distinct navConfigs keyed by role; nav-admin-users only appears for admin; direction_editor only sees 'Ma Direction' + a trimmed Référentiels (3 items) with no Alignement.

PlanAction.jsx properly filters by user.direction for direction_editor (5 rows for DAF), renders portfolio-stats, vue=delayed banner via useSearchParams, and constrains edit/save to own-direction activities.
KpiCascade.jsx shows validation-workspace + vw-list-* sections FIRST when role===me_validator, and falls back to standard KPI cascade for other roles.
CabinetView.jsx orders sections: cabinet-decisions (①) before cabinet-kpis (inside ⑥), confirmed visually and via bounding-box ordering.
Header.jsx has been stripped of global search input and notifications bell; user-menu-trigger and logout-button still functional.
format.js fmtMilliards/fmtMillions render 'milliards FCFA' with French separators; verified live values '1 202,1 milliards FCFA', '293,8 milliards FCFA', '5,6 milliards FCFA' on /budget-consolide.
test_credentials.md in /app/memory references a different (PND) app and does NOT contain METFPA credentials — should be updated to the METFPA accounts for future agents.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 4/4 role landings, 4/4 sidebars, 3/3 RBAC negatives, 7/7 regression pages, PDF, money format, edit flow, audit, header cleanup all green

test_credentials: Cabinet: cabinet@metfpa.ci | Direction (DAF): direction.daf@metfpa.ci | M&E Validator: validateur@metfpa.ci | Admin: admin@metfpa.ci — all with Metfpa@2026Demo. Token key in localStorage: 'metfpa_token'. Login testids: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button.
seed_data_creation: None. One transient direction_editor edit on the first DAF activity (avancement set to 55 or 60). No permanent data drift.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login button testid is 'login-submit-button' (NOT 'login-submit'). 4 role accounts work with Metfpa@2026Demo. Role landings: cabinet_reader→/pilotage-directeur, direction_editor→/plan-action, me_validator→/kpi-cascade, admin→/admin-users. Sidebars are data-testid='sidebar-nav-<role>'. AccessDenied panel testid='access-denied' for RBAC negatives. Cabinet decisions-before-KPIs is verified via bounding-box (cabinet-decisions vs cabinet-kpis). Direction_editor's portfolio shows exactly 5 rows for DAF (out of 62 total). /app/memory/test_credentials.md still has the OLD PND credentials — update to METFPA accounts. Screenshots saved to /tmp/role_{cabinet,direction,validator,admin}.png.
